docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCIBETTA, AILEEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JUJARE, SRI DBA  BOUTIKIA HOMES $2,027.50 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,092.50, STATUTORY DAMAGES ($1000.00) ARE AWARDED FOR DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH RETENTION OF PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT IN VIOLATION OF CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,027.50 FILED BY SCIBETTA, AILEEN AS TO DEFENDANT JUJARE, SRI DBA  BOUTIKIA HOMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-05-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JUJARE, SRI DBA  BOUTIKIA HOMES
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-16-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-16-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2011 - JUDGMENT.
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO DEPARTMENT 506 FOR REVIEW FILED BY DEFENDANT JUJARE, SRI DBA  BOUTIKIA HOMES
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT-GRANTED. COPY MAILED TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR AT NEW ADDRESS.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JUJARE, SRI DBA  BOUTIKIA HOMES
DEFENDANT'S NOTIFICATION TO COURT OF ADDRESS CHANGE FILED BY DEFENDANT JUJARE, SRI DBA  BOUTIKIA HOMES
